mapper.sql: s.id, s.doctor_id, s.department_id, s.schedule_date, s.time_slot, s.total_source, s.remaining_source, s.status, s.fee, s.clinic_room, s.create_time, s.update_time, d.doctor_name, dp.name as department_name, d.user_id
mapper.select: select from doctor_schedule s left join doctor_info d on s.doctor_id = d.id left join department_info dp on s.department_id = dp.id where s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into doctor_schedule(doctor_id, department_id, schedule_date, time_slot, total_source, remaining_source, status, fee, clinic_room, create_time, update_time) values (#{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{totalSource}, #{remainingSource}, #{status}, #{fee}, #{clinicRoom}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update doctor_schedule set doctor_id = #{doctorId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}, time_slot = #{timeSlot}, total_source = #{totalSource}, remaining_source = #{remainingSource}, status = #{status}, fee = #{fee}, clinic_room = #{clinicRoom}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
update doctor_schedule set remaining_source = remaining_source - 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 1 and remaining_source > 0
update doctor_schedule set remaining_source = remaining_source + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from doctor_schedule where doctor_id = #{doctorId}
